item.title: 2026-03: Sencillamente - Hakuna Group Music
item.description:
A profound Catholic worship song about faith, trust, and loving God unconditionally, regardless of feelings or circumstances.

Listen & Watch

Feel free to play the video below and let the music set the atmosphere as you read through the lyrics.

🎧

Lyrics

Creo, sencillamente Quiero disfrutar de la serenidad del creer Desligar el creer del sentir Creo, mi Dios, y basta.

Te creo en tus misterios Sin entenderlos Te creo en mí (te creo en mí) y en el pan blanco En el prójimo y en la creación Sin verte en ningún lado.

Creo, Señor, sencillamente Porque creer es confiar Y cómo me gusta creerte sintiendo dudas Sintiendo dudas Sintiendo dudas.

Digo que eres amor Escucho que soy tu amado No siento y qué más da Te quiero y eso basta.

Amor, Señor, sencillamente Porque amar es entregarse Y cómo me gusta amarte estando frío Estando frío Estando frío.

Espero en tu palabra Vivo en tu promesa Gozo en ti Lo que aún me falta.

Espero Señor, sencillamente Porque esperar es descansar Y cómo me gusta esperarte sintiendo miedo Sintiendo miedo Sintiendo miedo.

Creo (Señor sencillamente) Amo (sencillamente) Espero Cómo me gusta seguirte sintiendo dudas Estando frío Sintiendo miedo.

Cómo me gusta Cómo me gusta Creerte, amarte y esperarte.

Te sigo sencillamente

item.title: 2026-01: The Show - Kerris Dorsey
item.description:
Kerris Dorsey’s acoustic cover of “The Show” (famously featured in Moneyball) is a gentle, intimate song about embracing the uncertainty of life and love by letting go of control and simply enjoying the experience.

Listen & Watch

Feel free to play the video below and let the music set the atmosphere as you read through the lyrics.

🎧

Lyrics

I'm just a little bit caught in the middle Life is a maze and love is a riddle I don't know where to go, I can't do it alone, I've tried And I don't know why.

Slow it down, make it stop Or else my heart is going to pop 'Cause it's too much, yeah, it's a lot To be something I'm not I'm a fool out of love 'Cause I just can't get enough.

Yeah, I'm just a little bit caught in the middle Life is a maze and love is a riddle I don't know where to go, I can't do it alone, I've tried And I don't know why I am just a little girl, lost in the moment I'm so scared but I don't show it I can't figure it out, it's bringing me down, I know I've got to let it go and just enjoy the show.

The sun is hot in the sky Just like a giant spotlight The people follow the signs and synchronize in time It's a joke, nobody knows They've got a ticket to that show.

Yeah, I'm just a little bit caught in the middle Life is a maze and love is a riddle I don't know where to go, I can't do it alone, I've tried And I don't know why.

I am just a little girl, lost in the moment I'm so scared but I don't show it I can't figure it out, it's bringing me down, I know I've got to let it go and just enjoy the show Just enjoy the show I'm just a little bit caught in the middle Life is a maze and love is a riddle I don't know where to go, I can't do it alone, I've tried And I don't know why I am just a little girl, lost in the moment I'm so scared but I don't show it I can't figure it out, it's bringing me down, I know I've got to let it go and just enjoy the show.

Dum de dum, dudum de dum Just enjoy the show Dum de dum, dudum de dum Just enjoy the show.

I want my money back I want my money back I want my money back Just enjoy the show I want my money back I want my money back I want my money back Just enjoy the show.

Te sigo sencillamente

item.title: 2025-11: Non fa paura - Bandabardo/Cisco
item.description:
An anthem of resilience and friendship that encourages overcoming fear and adversity through togetherness, urging listeners to keep singing and looking forward to returning to the streets.

Listen & Watch

Feel free to play the video below and let the music set the atmosphere as you read through the lyrics.

🎧

Lyrics

Strada vuota, forestiera Nella notte fredda e nera Luce spaventosa di sirena Non fa paura se sei qui con me Non fa paura se sei qui con me.

Porte chiuse, niente luci Giorni lunghi senza voci Uomini impauriti, più confusi Non fa paura se sei qui con me Non fa paura se sei qui con me.

[Ritornello] Canta a squarciagola alla finestra Che il dolore piano svanirà Torneremo presto sulla strada Tutto il mondo intero ci vedrà.

Mondo strano, spaventato Mondo piccolo e spietato Mondo che ogni giorno è più malato Non fa paura se sei qui con me Non fa paura se sei qui con me.

[Ritornello] Canta a squarciagola alla finestra Che il dolore piano svanirà Torneremo presto sulla strada Tutto il mondo intero ci vedrà.

[Outro] Mondo in festa e animato Mondo vivo, è rinato Ora è tutto bello e colorato Non fa paura se sei qui con me Non fa paura se sei qui con me Non fa paura se sei qui con me.
